programmes.show_description: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1989!

programmes.show_name: The Heritage Chart with Mike Read

Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!

programmes.show_description: 10 fabulous 80s videos featuring lots of motors. And some of them feature lovely ladies sprawled over lovely cars. Enjoy!

Todd Carty and Erkan Mustafa - otherwise known as Grange Hill's Tucker and Roland - host the ultimate school disco! But as they prop up the bar, will anyone else turn up?

programmes.show_name: All Day - Every Song A No.1!
programmes.show_description: A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!
In order - Mark Goodier's 11-hour journey through the decade's biggest number 1 songs, from ABBA and Adam Ant to Wham!, Madonna, Rick Astley and Kylie Minogue.

programmes.show_name: All Day - Every Song A No.1!
programmes.show_description: A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!
Amazingly, every one of these 23 top tunes only spent seven days at the top of the UK chart during the 1980s - even big songs by superstars like Madonna, Kylie, Blondie and U2!

programmes.show_name: All Day - Every Song A No.1!
